message:
feat(robot): wire --robot-env flag and improve env command (bd-18gwh)

Wire the existing env detection code to CLI via --robot-env=SESSION flag.
Add session existence validation (returns structured error JSON for missing
sessions), strip "tmux " prefix from version output, and add integration
tests for global mode, non-existent session, and response envelope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
